content.content: I really liked the T-shirt I bought last month. Could you please buy two more for me?

<function_thought>
To assist Emma in purchasing two more T-shirts, I will first access her order history to locate the specific T-shirt she bought last month. Once I have identified the product ID for the T-shirt, I will proceed to add two of those T-shirts to the cart and then proceed to checkout.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_order_history()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
